description: Index of community-contributed OpenEye skills. Each entry points to a skill markdown in this directory. To install: python community-skills/install.py <skill-name>

skills.name: bolt-assembly-m6
skills.description: M6 bolt installation: bracket positioning, insertion, hand-tighten, torque to 12 Nm.

skills.name: equipment-pre-op-check
skills.description: Pre-operation safety + readiness check for industrial equipment.

skills.name: visual-qc
skills.description: Visual quality control for line-station inspection.

skills.name: lockout-tagout
skills.description: Electrical isolation procedure: disconnect, lock, tag, verify zero energy.

skills.name: hand-hygiene
skills.description: Hand-washing protocol — illustrative example, not a validated clinical protocol.
skills.advisory: Illustrative only. Not a validated clinical protocol — review independently before any clinical or compliance use.
